rationale: Change streams spec governs cursor initialization; unexpected getMore on construction violates spec-defined behavior for new change streams.
No mapReduce spec mandates jsMode default; driver setting wrong default from docs error, no spec rule violated.
GridFS spec explicitly says uploadDate MUST be datetime when upload completed; driver set it at construction instead.
Wrong PHP class check for JavascriptInterface; pure PHP implementation bug, no spec rule involved.
No mapReduce spec mandates verbose default; driver copied wrong default from docs; no spec rule contradicted.
TypeMapArrayIterator only applying type map to current(); internal PHP API issue, no spec-defined behavior.
Change streams spec requires resumption on resumable errors; rewind() failed to resume, violating spec requirement.
Change streams batchSize spec governs getMore behavior; batchSize option not propagated to getMore as spec requires.
Collection typeMap inheritance by watch() is PHP library API behavior; no specific change streams spec rule mandates it.
GridFS seek optimization to avoid re-querying; performance improvement, no spec rule about seek implementation.
Aggregate typeMap option incorrectly rejected for non-cursor mode; PHP library API bug, no spec rule involved.
ChangeStream key increment on ResumeTokenException is PHP iterator protocol; no spec-defined key increment behavior.
PHP iterator key starts at 1 instead of 0 for first event; PHP protocol issue, no spec-defined key semantics.
Sessions spec requires session option to be properly passed to commands; createIndex() incorrectly merged session into index spec.
Object cloning support for BSONArray/BSONDocument; PHP API enhancement, no spec requirement.
Change streams spec requires same session used for resume as original aggregate; driver created new session on resume.
findAndModify failing with non-local readConcern from connection string; server limitation, not a driver spec rule violation.
Implicit change stream session defaulting causalConsistency=true adds unexpected ReadConcern; spec requires implicit sessions have causalConsistency=false.
Deep clone of BSONArray/BSONDocument not handling uncloneable objects; PHP-specific implementation bug, no spec involvement.
Improving logic to skip transaction spec tests based on server configuration; test infrastructure, not driver behavior.
countDocuments throws on empty result due to unexpected type in aggregation result handling; PHP implementation bug, not spec.
Causal consistency examples for the manual; documentation task, not a driver bug or spec nonconformance.
CRUD spec test harness checks wrong field name 'upsertedId' instead of 'upsertedIds'; test runner bug, not driver behavior.
Spec change requires bypassDocumentValidation only sent when true; driver was sending it regardless, contradicting spec.
CRUD spec requires batchSize ignored for $out aggregations; SPEC-826 added test; PHPLIB faulty test runner missed the bug.
GridFS spec test runner stopped comparison when first cursor exhausted; MultipleIterator flag bug in test infrastructure.
Relax aggregate explain test assertion for 4.2 server behavior change; test compatibility fix, not driver behavior.
Change streams spec requires updating resume token after resumption; driver reused same startAtOperationTime repeatedly instead.
Key increment on ResumeTokenException is PHP iterator behavior reversal; no spec-defined key semantics for change stream iteration.
Change streams spec's Resumable Error definition too broad; root cause in spec, depends on DRIVERS-650 for spec fix.
ChangeStream key not incremented on resume causing iterator_to_array key collision; PHP iterator key tracking, not spec behavior.
Change streams spec requires non-resumable errors to be surfaced; driver swallowed all exceptions in next()/rewind().
Change streams spec prohibits getMore during rewind/resume when firstBatch empty; driver issued unexpected getMore commands.
Transactions spec: 'Users cannot pass readConcern or writeConcern to operations in transactions'; driver inherited them from Collection.
ResumeTokenException extending wrong PHP base class; PHP API design issue, no spec requirement on exception hierarchy.
DRIVERS-615/SPEC-1232 require countDocuments use group _id:1; driver used different grouping, contradicting spec requirement.
Internal refactor of CountDocuments/EstimatedDocumentCount to encapsulate operations; no behavior change, not spec.
Internal refactor to use field path syntax for type maps; no spec behavior change, pure code restructuring.
PHP 7.4 compatibility build fix; language runtime compatibility, no spec involvement.
Change streams spec requires consistent position invalidation on iteration failure; pre-4.1.8 behavior diverged from 4.1.8+ expected behavior.
Transaction spec tests for read concern inheritance skipped; driver not properly inheriting read concern per spec; tests re-enabled after fix.
Issue split from DRIVERS-744; adding missing spec tests for aggregation pipeline in bulk write updates; test infrastructure.
Spec update added pipeline support to bulk write update model; BulkWrite overlooked, missing required spec feature.
distinct() not inheriting collection typeMap; PHP library API oversight, no spec requirement on typeMap inheritance.
Depends on DRIVERS-749; updating connections survive primary stepdown spec tests; test infrastructure update.
Generator memory leak causing cursors to stay open; internal PHP resource management bug, no spec rule contradicted.
PHP isset vs array_key_exists for null option values causing GridFS infinite loop; PHP-specific implementation bug, not spec.
CI build crashes with invalid pointer on shutdown after PHP 7.3 upgrade; CI/runtime stability issue, not spec behavior.
DRIVERS-731 spec update: listIndexes must handle absence of 'ns' field; driver did not handle this spec-required case.
Depends on DRIVERS-787; adding spec test to validate mongocryptd not spawned when bypassAutoEncryption=true; test infrastructure.
